title: to부정사 & 동명사 (명사 역할)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 명사 역할을 하는 to부정사 또는 동명사구를 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 그 역할을 (S, O, C)로 표시한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: To exercise regularly is good for your health.

answer.analysis: [To exercise regularly](S) is good for your health.

problems.stem: I hope to see you again soon.

answer.analysis: I hope [to see you again soon](O).
answer.translation: 나는 곧 당신을 다시 보기를 희망한다.

problems.stem: My goal is winning the first prize.

answer.analysis: My goal is [winning the first prize](C).

problems.stem: Learning a new skill takes time and effort.

answer.analysis: [Learning a new skill](S) takes time and effort.
answer.translation: 새로운 기술을 배우는 것은 시간과 노력이 든다.

problems.stem: His promise was to help me with the project.

answer.analysis: His promise was [to help me with the project](C).
answer.translation: 그의 약속은 내가 프로젝트를 하는 것을 돕는 것이

problems.stem: To tell a lie is wrong.
Her hobby is taking pictures of flowers.

answer.analysis: Her hobby is [taking pictures of flowers](C).
answer.translation: 그녀의 취미는 꽃 사진을 찍는 것이다.

problems.stem: He promised to call me every day.

answer.analysis: He promised [to call me every day](O).
